connection_lifecycle_pool/100_rpcs_no_po.description: 100 sequential RPCs without connection pool (100 full TLS handshakes)
connection_lifecycle_pool/100_rpcs_no_po.note: Each RPC does a full TLS handshake (~237µs)

connection_lifecycle_pool/100_rpcs_with_.description: 100 sequential RPCs with connection pool (1 handshake + 99 stream opens)
connection_lifecycle_pool/100_rpcs_with_.note: Each RPC just opens a stream on existing connection (~0.39µs)

connection_lifecycle_migration/rebind_en.description: Time to rebind endpoint to new UDP socket (connection migration)
connection_lifecycle_migration/rebind_en.note: Endpoint rebind triggers QUIC connection migration via PATH_CHALLENGE/RESPONSE

key_findings.rebind_time: 14.31µs — connection migration is fast enough for real-time NAT rebinding

methodology.note: Pool benchmark uses raw QUIC streams (no AAFP handshake) to isolate connection reuse benefit. The AAFP handshake adds ~240µs overhead per new connection.
